assertions.evidence: Section 5 'Embedding Strategy' (lines 336-369) covers model selection, rationale for sentence-transformers, embedding at scale, and cost projections
Section 4.1 'Signal Ingestion Pipeline' (lines 157-227) shows complete flow from signal storage to async embedding job to Pinecone upsert with pseudocode
No dedicated trade-off analysis section. Document discusses design choices and phases (MVP, Growth, Scale, Enterprise) but lacks explicit trade-off table comparing alternatives
Section 9 'Scaling Path' (lines 514-538) outlines phases from MVP through Enterprise, clearly delineating Phase 1 MVP scope vs future phases

notes: Solid system design with comprehensive technical details and multi-phase roadmap. Missing explicit trade-off analysis section (which is a best practice for system designs). Otherwise well-structured with code snippets and implementation details.
